summary: Analytics Dashboard feature testing complete. Backend API /api/analytics/dashboard and frontend AnalyticsTab component both working correctly. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend displays all required elements with correct data-testid attributes. Analytics tab correctly visible only for admin role.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning in console about <tr> inside <span> in top_products table - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/dashboard?year=2026&month=4 returns 200
✅ Backend: Response has correct structure {current, previous, growth}
✅ Backend: current has all required fields (total_revenue, invoice_count, avg_ticket, by_server, by_payment_method, by_department, daily_stats, top_products)
✅ Backend: previous has same fields for previous month
✅ Backend: growth has revenue_pct, invoice_count_pct, avg_ticket_pct
✅ Backend: top_products limited to max 10 items
✅ Backend: top_products contains 'Poulet braise' with ~6 units
✅ Backend: Payment methods normalized (mobile_money->mobile, especes->cash, bon-client->wallet)
✅ Backend: Month=1 correctly uses year-1, month=12 for previous
✅ Backend: Only validated invoices counted in revenue/count stats
✅ Backend: Growth percentage positive (~684%) when current > previous
✅ Backend: by_server has correct structure (total, count)
✅ Backend: by_department has expected keys (salle_jardin, jeux, bar, location, autres)
✅ Backend: daily_stats has correct structure (revenue, count)
✅ Backend: Default params work (uses current month)
✅ Backend: assigned_week logic respected (invoices transferred to other months excluded)
✅ Frontend: Admin login with password 'Caisse2026' works
✅ Frontend: Analytics tab (data-testid='tab-analytics') visible for admin
✅ Frontend: Analytics tab NOT visible for Gérante (manager role)
✅ Frontend: AnalyticsTab (data-testid='analytics-tab') renders correctly
✅ Frontend: analytics-kpis shows 4 KPI cards (CA, Factures, Panier moyen, Serveurs actifs)
✅ Frontend: analytics-daily-chart shows BarChart with daily revenues
✅ Frontend: analytics-top-servers shows horizontal bar chart
✅ Frontend: analytics-payment-pie shows PieChart with payment methods
✅ Frontend: analytics-dept-pie shows PieChart with department breakdown
✅ Frontend: analytics-top-products shows table with top 10 products
✅ Frontend: analytics-comparison shows 3 cells with previous month data
✅ Frontend: analytics-month-picker triggers data reload on change
✅ Frontend: GrowthBadge shows green (text-emerald-400) for positive percentages
✅ Frontend: GrowthBadge shows red (text-rose-400) for negative percentages
✅ Frontend: GrowthBadge shows gray (text-slate-400) for 0 percentage
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoint correctly implements assigned_week logic to respect invoice transfers between months
Payment method normalization handles all expected variants (mobile_money, especes, bon-client, etc.)
Month boundary handling correct (month=1 uses year-1, month=12)
Only validated invoices (validation_status='validated') counted in stats
Frontend correctly restricts Analytics tab to admin role only (currentUser?.role === 'admin')
Minor: React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> in top_products table - caused by dynamic rendering wrapper, doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, role-based visibility correct)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing validated invoices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint /api/analytics/dashboard returns monthly KPIs with MoM comparison. Frontend AnalyticsTab component displays all charts and tables correctly. Tab visibility restricted to admin role. All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.
